name: latency-hunter-toolkit
description: Latency Hunter Toolkit — a quant-engineering Claude Code plugin for solo traders. Three skills: backtest-guard (回测照妖镜, backtest pitfall audit), latency-audit (热路径猎手, C++ low-latency hot-path review) and connector-forge (连接器锻造, Binance/OKX connector scaffolding). No alpha, no keys — engineering only.

plugins.name: latency-hunter
plugins.description: Quant engineering skills: backtest-guard + latency-audit + connector-forge. Audit your backtests for look-ahead / overfitting / cost bugs, hunt the lock contention and allocations that kill C++ tail latency, and forge production-grade Binance/OKX connectors with reconnect, heartbeat, rate-limit and signing baked in.
